project_name: Harshit MadeIt - Premium Motion Designer Portfolio

theme_and_archetype.description: Apple-inspired minimalist dark mode, Linear-like SaaS app design patterns, high-contrast, calm, professional.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento layout for services/projects, strict alignment, 1px subtle borders (border-white/5)
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons

navigation.style: Glassmorphism sticky header. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050505]/70 border-b border-white/5

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium text-sm
buttons.accent: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-500 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium text-sm shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(37,99,235,0.3)]

cards.project_card: group relative bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-500
cards.hover_state: Slight lift (-translate-y-1), image scale (group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700)

modal.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-center justify-center p-4 md:p-8
modal.content: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/10 rounded-2xl w-full max-w-5xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto relative

motion_and_interaction.scrolling: Implement smooth scrolling (Lenis or similar logic) for premium feel
motion_and_interaction.hover_effects: Smooth color transitions (duration-300), subtle inner glows on cards

media_urls.description: Dark minimalist grid. Use with heavy black overlay (opacity 10-15%)
Supabase Spec Ad abstract 3D dark thumbnail. Use with a 'Play / Coming Soon' overlay.
SaaS Product Spec Ad dark digital art thumbnail. Use with a 'Play / Coming Soon' overlay.
SaaS Explainer Animation dark 3D abstract thumbnail. Use with a 'Play / Coming Soon' overlay.
Professional designer portrait for the About Section

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard JS and JSX files (.js / .jsx), do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx).
All interactive elements and key sections MUST have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='project-card-1').
For the hero background, apply a very heavy black overlay so the grid pattern is barely visible, prioritizing text readability.
For the 'Coming Soon' video behavior: when a user clicks 'View Project' on a card, open the Case Study modal instead of playing a video.
The Case Study modal must include structured sections: Overview, Objective, Storyboard, Design Frames, Motion Process, Final Video (mark as coming soon), Key Learnings.
Ensure the contact form uses custom UI matching the dark theme (no default unstyled HTML inputs). Use 1px white/10 borders.
Rely heavily on typography sizes and tracking to create the Apple-inspired premium feel. Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for body text via Google Fonts.
Avoid heavy drop shadows; prefer 1px borders and inner glows to define depth.
Keep gradients restricted to small accents (like the electric blue #2563EB), avoid large gradient backgrounds.
